resultList.dtldesc: Live life in comfort and style by owning this 2 BHK apartment on sale in the elite Anuhar Towers, situated in the peaceful Alkapur Township of Hyderabad. This large home is perfect for families looking for an active community with all facilities at their doorstep.::::::Property Specifications::::::This vacant flat has a super area of 1446 sq ft and is positioned on the 12th floor of a maintained 16-story building. To be Vaastu compliant, the flat is west-facing to bring in plenty of natural light and a positive flow of energy. Being a corner property with two open sides, it provides good ventilation and a sense of openness. Two well-furnished bedrooms, one attached bathroom, and one common bathroom are part of the well-planned layout, both equipped with modern fixtures. ::::::You will be privileged with the facility of three balconies—two from the bedrooms and one from the living area, all facing a lovely garden space. The living cum dining area is a great place to relax and have family time. The standard kitchen boasts of a piped gas connection, and a utility space is affiliated for the convenience of the occupants. The floors of the flat are surfaced with chic vitrified tiles for an overall gleam.::::::Facilities::::::Anuhar Towers residents enjoy a variety of great facilities, such as covered parking, 24 hours water supply, and 100% power backup to provide seamless living. Security is ensured with an exclusive security guard on duty and CCTV cameras placed on the premises.::::::The building has two lifts for convenience in accessing all levels. The community comes with a variety of amenities, such as a children's playground, gym, and swimming pool, making it ideal for families and health-conscious individuals.::::::Locality::::::Situated conveniently close to the 100 feet road, this apartment benefits from proximity to necessary services. Schools and hospitals are found within the same society, so that all the needs of your family members are at hand at just a short walking distance. Shopping malls and supermarkets are also within reach, offering plenty of shopping opportunities. Public transport is readily available within the neighborhood, and banks and ATMs are found conveniently nearby.
